events.content: Moved Relaycast broker integration under relaycast module tree: Moved Relaycast broker integration under relaycast module tree

raw.question: Moved Relaycast broker integration under relaycast module tree
raw.chosen: Moved Relaycast broker integration under relaycast module tree
raw.reasoning: Issue 877 asks for ownership cleanup without protocol changes; moving auth, websocket/http transport, event/command mapping, and multi-workspace session code under crates/broker/src/relaycast gives runtime callers a single relay_broker::relaycast boundary while compatibility shims preserve existing public paths.

retrospective.summary: Refactored broker Relaycast integration into the relaycast module tree with compatibility re-exports and updated runtime callers to use relay_broker::relaycast.
